'__string', ], ], '__string' => [ 'type' => 'string', ], '__stringMax256' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 256, ], '__stringMax64' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 64, ], '__stringMax64PatternAAZAZ09Z' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 64, 'pattern' => '\\A[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\\z', ], '__stringPatternAWSAZaZ09AZaZ09' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'pattern' => 'AWS::[A-Za-z0-9]+::[A-Za-z0-9]+', ], ],];
